outlets.name: CNN
outlets.headline: Two months into the Iran war, almost everybody is a loser
outlets.summary: CNN analysis argues both US and Iran are losing — economically, diplomatically, and strategically. Only China emerges as potential winner. Spirit Airlines' collapse cited as first US corporate casualty.

outlets.name: NPR
outlets.headline: Iran submits 14-point response to U.S. proposal to end war
outlets.summary: NPR details Iran's demands: end war in 30 days, US withdrawal, end blockade, reparations. Trump 'can't imagine it would be acceptable.'

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: Trump says war with Iran necessary to prevent 'lunatics' from obtaining nuclear weapon
outlets.summary: Fox covers Trump defending war as existential necessity. Warns of restarting strikes 'if they misbehave.' $8.6B arms sales framed as strengthening regional allies.

outlets.name: Daily Wire
outlets.headline: In War Powers Letter to Congress, Trump Shares Changes Coming to Iran War
outlets.summary: Daily Wire frames Trump's 'hostilities terminated' letter as shrewd legal strategy. Highlights Senate's failure to pass War Powers Resolution.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: Iran war: IRGC warns conflict 'likely' to resume as Trump rejects peace proposal
outlets.summary: Al Jazeera leads with IRGC warning of war resumption and Trump's rejection of Iran's 14-point plan. Reports 41 killed in Lebanon strikes.

outlets.name: Euronews
outlets.headline: Fertiliser crisis caused by Iran war sparks global food security fears
outlets.summary: Euronews reports 50% of global urea/sulfur exports and 20% of LNG (fertilizer feedstock) normally transit Hormuz. Global fertilizer shortage threatens food production.

outlets.name: Times of Israel
outlets.headline: Trump: There's a chance US could restart strikes on Iran
outlets.summary: ToI covers Trump's warning of potential renewed strikes. IDF destroys ~120 Hezbollah sites. Katz: Israel may 'act again' on existential threats. 6,500 tons military equipment arriving.

outlets.name: Haaretz
outlets.headline: Iran senior commander says hostilities 'likely' to resume
outlets.summary: Haaretz reports IRGC deputy commander Asadi's war resumption warning alongside Israeli strikes killing 6 including a child in Lebanon.

outlets.name: PressTV
outlets.headline: Leader vows to defeat enemy in economic, cultural wars following Iran's victory on battlefield
outlets.summary: PressTV frames Mojtaba Khamenei's Teacher/Labor Day message as victory declaration. 'Economic and cultural jihad' to defeat US after military phase.

outlets.name: Iran International
outlets.headline: Iran cuts oil output as US blockade strains storage
outlets.summary: Iran International reports exports collapsed 70% to 567K bpd. Onshore storage approaching capacity — 12-24 days remaining. Older tankers used as floating storage.
